title: rubus infrarugosus
intro: Rubus infrarugosus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and prevent infections. The health benefits of Rubus infrarugosus include its ability to support digestive health and reduce oxidative stress, making it a potential natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Rubus infrarugosus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
